question: How do I create a new account on CloudDesk?
answer: Click Sign Up on the homepage, enter your work email, choose a strong password, and verify your email address from the confirmation link.

question: I did not receive my verification email. What should I do?
answer: Check your spam or promotions folder first. If it is still missing, click Resend Verification in the login page and ensure your email address is typed correctly.

question: How can I reset my password?
answer: Use the Forgot Password option on the login page. We will send a secure reset link to your registered email address.

question: Can I change the email linked to my account?
answer: Yes. Go to Profile Settings > Account Details, update your email, and complete verification from the new inbox.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Open Security Settings, turn on Two-Factor Authentication, then scan the QR code with an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.

question: Why is my account locked?
answer: Accounts are temporarily locked after multiple failed login attempts for security. Wait 15 minutes or reset your password to unlock sooner.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept major credit and debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfer for annual enterprise plans.

question: How can I update my billing information?
answer: Go to Billing > Payment Methods in your workspace settings and edit your card details or add a new payment method.

question: Where can I download my invoices?
answer: Invoices are available in Billing > Invoices. You can download each invoice as a PDF at any time.

question: Do you offer monthly and yearly plans?
answer: Yes. Monthly plans are flexible, while yearly plans include a discounted rate compared to monthly billing.

question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
answer: Yes. You can cancel anytime from Billing Settings. Your paid features remain active until the current billing period ends.

question: Do you provide refunds after renewal?
answer: Refunds are evaluated case-by-case and depend on your plan terms. Contact support within 7 days of renewal for review.

question: What happens if my payment fails?
answer: We retry failed payments automatically and send reminder emails. If payment still fails, your workspace may move to a limited mode.

question: What is included in the Free plan?
answer: The Free plan includes basic task management, limited storage, and up to 3 team members.

question: What is the difference between Pro and Enterprise?
answer: Pro is ideal for growing teams and includes advanced automations. Enterprise adds SSO, custom security controls, and a dedicated success manager.

question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan later?
answer: Yes. You can change plans anytime from Billing Settings. Charges are prorated based on your current billing cycle.

question: Do you offer discounts for students or nonprofits?
answer: Yes. Eligible students and nonprofit organizations can apply for special discounted pricing through our sales team.

question: The app is running slowly. How can I fix it?
answer: Try refreshing the page, clearing browser cache, and disabling heavy extensions. If the issue continues, check our status page for incidents.

question: How do I report a bug?
answer: Open Help > Report a Bug and include steps to reproduce, screenshots, and your browser version so our team can investigate quickly.

question: Which browsers are supported?
answer: We support the latest two versions of Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Safari for best performance and security.

question: Why am I seeing a 500 server error?
answer: A 500 error usually indicates a temporary backend issue. Retry after a minute, then contact support if it persists.

question: Can I use CloudDesk on mobile devices?
answer: Yes. You can use our iOS and Android apps or access the responsive web app in mobile browsers.

question: Does CloudDesk integrate with Slack?
answer: Yes. Connect Slack from Integrations to receive task alerts, reminders, and workflow notifications directly in channels.

question: How do I connect Google Calendar?
answer: Go to Integrations > Google Calendar, authorize your account, and choose which project events should sync.

question: Do you provide an API for developers?
answer: Yes. Our REST API is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. You can generate API tokens under Developer Settings.

question: Can I use webhooks for real-time updates?
answer: Yes. Create webhook endpoints in Developer Settings to receive events like task creation, status updates, and comments.

question: How is my data protected?
answer: We encrypt data in transit using TLS and at rest using AES-256. We also enforce strict access controls and security monitoring.

question: Are you compliant with GDPR?
answer: Yes. CloudDesk supports GDPR requirements, including data access, correction, and deletion requests.

question: Do you support single sign-on (SSO)?
answer: Yes. SSO with SAML and OIDC is available on Enterprise plans.

question: How can I request account data deletion?
answer: Submit a deletion request from Privacy Settings or contact support from your registered account email.

question: How do I invite team members to my workspace?
answer: Go to Workspace Settings > Members, enter teammate emails, assign roles, and send invitations.

question: Can I assign different roles to users?
answer: Yes. Available roles include Owner, Admin, Member, and Viewer, each with different permissions.

question: How can I mention someone in a comment?
answer: Type @ followed by the teammate name in comments. They will receive a notification.

question: Can external clients access only specific projects?
answer: Yes. Add them as Guest users and restrict access to selected projects only.

question: How do I export project data?
answer: Open Project Settings > Export and choose CSV or JSON format for tasks, comments, and activity logs.

question: Can I import tasks from Trello or Asana?
answer: Yes. Use the Import tool in Settings to map and migrate boards or tasks from supported platforms.

question: How often is data backed up?
answer: We run automated backups daily, with additional replication to ensure data durability.

question: How do I turn off email notifications?
answer: Go to Notification Preferences and disable the email events you no longer want to receive.

question: Can I customize push notification settings?
answer: Yes. Mobile push preferences can be configured from both in-app Notification Settings and your device settings.

question: Do you have tutorials for new users?
answer: Yes. Visit the Help Center for guided tutorials, short videos, and onboarding checklists for teams.
